description: Sample data for MindNest. 'labeled_texts' exercise the rule-based + transformer text pipeline; 'scenarios' are persona answer-profiles used by the demo seeder and as reference cases. Synthetic, non-clinical, illustrative only.

labeled_texts.text: Honestly I'm so overwhelmed, the deadlines keep piling up and I can't switch off.
My chest feels tight and my thoughts are racing. I keep dreading tomorrow.
Everything feels grey and empty. I don't see the point in much lately.
I had a genuinely good day - laughed with friends and felt grateful.
I'm running on empty. Work has drained everything out of me and I feel nothing about it now.
So exhausted. I wake up tired and have no energy for anything.
I feel completely alone, like no one would notice if I disappeared for a week.
I'm furious. Every little thing sets me off and I keep snapping at people.
One minute I'm fine, the next I'm in tears. My moods are all over the place.
I just can't get motivated. Starting anything feels impossible right now.
Things have been okay, nothing special, just an ordinary week.
I'm not stressed at all actually, feeling pretty calm and steady.
